name: Trend Identification
description: Spots emerging performance trends early in advertising data to enable proactive optimization, budget reallocation, and strategic pivots before trends become obvious.

variables.name: metrics
variables.description: Performance metrics to monitor: CTR, CPC, ROAS, impressions, conversions, CPA

variables.name: time_period
variables.description: Time window for analysis: daily, weekly, monthly

variables.name: benchmarks
variables.description: Benchmarks to compare against: industry averages, past performance, targets

variables.name: alert_threshold
variables.description: Change threshold that triggers an alert (e.g., >10% change)

inputs.name: metrics
inputs.description: Performance metrics to monitor: CTR, CPC, ROAS, impressions, conversions, CPA

inputs.name: time_period
inputs.description: Time window for analysis: daily, weekly, monthly

inputs.name: benchmarks
inputs.description: Benchmarks to compare against: industry averages, past performance, targets

inputs.name: alert_threshold
inputs.description: Change threshold that triggers an alert (e.g., >10% change)
